scripts.mobile:logs: bash -lc 'serial=${ADB_SERIAL:-$(adb devices | awk '"'"'NR > 1 && $2 == "device" {print $1; exit}'"'"')}; if [ -z "$serial" ]; then echo "No connected adb device found. Set ADB_SERIAL or run bun run mobile:connect." >&2; exit 1; fi; adb -s "$serial" logcat | rg "ReactNativeJS|chalk|Expo"'
scripts.dev:mobile: bash -lc 'if command -v adb >/dev/null 2>&1; then adb reverse tcp:8080 tcp:8080 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; bun run --cwd apps/mobile start'
scripts.dev:mobile:android: bash -lc 'if command -v adb >/dev/null 2>&1; then adb reverse tcp:8080 tcp:8080 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; bun run --cwd apps/mobile android'
